title: K-Shaped Economy Persists Due to Inflation
summary: New research highlights inflation's role in maintaining the K-shaped economic recovery in the US, exacerbating inequality.
charlotte_impact: Understanding the drivers of economic disparity is crucial for policy interventions and investment strategies.

title: Circle's Stance on Stablecoin Freezes
summary: Circle will only freeze its stablecoin with a court order or law enforcement direction, maintaining a cautious approach to intervention.
charlotte_impact: This policy impacts user trust and regulatory compliance within the stablecoin ecosystem.

title: Gary Shilling Predicts Recession and Stock Market Plunge
summary: Economist Gary Shilling forecasts a significant stock market decline by year-end due to high valuations and economic headwinds.
charlotte_impact: This prediction could influence investor behavior and market stability in the coming months.

title: China Bans AI-Driven Layoffs
summary: Chinese court rules against replacing employees with AI to cut costs, protecting workers from automation-related job losses.
charlotte_impact: This legal precedent could shape AI adoption and labor practices globally.

title: OpenClaw's Rise in China's AI Agent Economy

title: Wall Street Optimism Contrasts Consumer Gloom

title: Poll: Americans Distrust Trump on Crypto

title: Meta's AI Push Leads to Layoffs and Wage Suppression

title: Trump Team's Confusing Economic Message

title: Economist Roubini's Iran War Scenarios and Market Impact

title: GameStop CEO Banned From eBay
